description_long: This object is a rectangular carton with a predominantly brown color scheme, featuring playful and colorful graphics on its front and back. The front displays a cartoon child in a superhero costume, a splash of milk, and a piece of chocolate, along with prominent branding and product information in both English and Arabic. The sides of the carton provide detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and additional branding, with one side in English and the other in Arabic. The top of the carton is flat and sealed, with a small white area that may indicate a perforation or opening mechanism. The packaging is glossy and smooth, typical of laminated cardboard cartons used for liquid products. The overall design is vibrant and appealing, targeting a youthful audience.
description: A brown, rectangular carton with playful graphics, featuring a cartoon child, chocolate, and milk imagery, and detailed product information in English and Arabic.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with Arabic text, ingredients, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the carton, featuring the cartoon child, chocolate, milk splash, and prominent Arabic branding.
description_view_2: This view shows the side with English nutritional facts, ingredients, and a QR code near the bottom.
description_view_3: This view presents the front of the carton in English, with the cartoon child, chocolate, milk splash, and product branding.
